description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a predominantly gray coloration and a rugged, weathered surface. The rock displays a variety of subtle textures, including pitted areas, shallow cracks, and mottled patches of lighter and darker gray. Its form is somewhat rounded on one side and more angular on the other, suggesting natural erosion or breakage. The surface is matte and non-reflective, with no visible markings, graffiti, or artificial modifications. The rock appears dense and solid, typical of granite or similar stone, and would be heavy to move. Its size and shape make it suitable as a natural barrier or landscaping element in an urban park or roadside setting.
description: A medium-sized, irregular gray rock with a rough, weathered surface and natural textural variations. Its solid, dense appearance makes it suitable as a barrier or landscaping feature.
description_view_0: The rock appears broad and slightly flattened, with a mix of smooth and rough patches and a prominent crack on the right side.
description_view_1: From this angle, the rock looks more rounded and compact, with a darker, more uniform surface and subtle pitting.
description_view_2: This view highlights the rock's angular side and a large, rough patch, with visible surface irregularities and a slight bulge.
description_view_3: The rock appears taller and more upright, with a smoother, less detailed surface and faint mottling.
